channel.title: Nathan J. B. Kraft on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in Nathan J. B. Kraft on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: A competition-defence trade-off both promotes and weakens coexistence in an annual plant community
item.description: Abstract Competition-defence trade-offs have long been thought to promote plant coexistence and increase species diversity.
